useWhen: custom vertical layout not covered by semantic nodes
avoidWhen: a semantic node such as list, group, or section fits the use case

useWhen: custom horizontal layout not covered by semantic nodes
avoidWhen: a semantic node such as label fits the use case

useWhen: overlapping layers are needed
content may overflow vertically or horizontally
avoidWhen: content fits on screen without scrolling

useWhen: pushing adjacent views apart in hstack or vstack
avoidWhen: spacing prop on the parent stack is sufficient

useWhen: explicit alignment or sizing constraints needed on a subtree
avoidWhen: no alignment or sizing constraint is needed

useWhen: any static or bound text display
small inline decorative SF Symbol glyph
avoidWhen: a larger standalone image is needed

useWhen: standalone image or SF Symbol at larger scale
boolean state needed; requires bind as boolean in state.vars
small count or status indicator
icon and text as a single semantic unit
single-line user text input needed; always requires bind in state.vars
numeric range input needed; always requires bind, min, and max in state.vars
avoidWhen: discrete selection from a short list is needed

useWhen: decorative geometric background, divider, or indicator
avoidWhen: a real image asset is more appropriate

useWhen: user tap action needed; always requires event.tap wired to events handler
avoidWhen: the intent is navigation row selection rather than an explicit action

useWhen: contextual action list triggered by a single button
visually grouping related content with optional title or footer outside of list
avoidWhen: inside list where section is more appropriate

useWhen: top-level screen has multiple distinct parallel tabs
avoidWhen: navigation between screens is sequential rather than parallel

useWhen: direct child of tabview only
screen needs a navigation bar with title or toolbar
avoidWhen: screen is tab content without its own navigation bar

useWhen: content is rows of data or settings
avoidWhen: content needs custom spacing or is not row-based

useWhen: grouping rows inside list with an optional header
avoidWhen: used outside list where group is more appropriate

useWhen: tabular data with column structure
avoidWhen: data does not require column headers or tabular layout
